steps.t: The waggon bearing Isildur's bones is in Laerlad, on the road beside the Gladden Fields.
The shade of Isildur feels the presence of his bones, and follows with interest their northward course along the river.
Gandalf is by the waggon bearing Isildur's bones through Laerlad.
Gandalf has directed you to <rgb=#00FF00>look</rgb> for the source of the dread near the waggon bearing Isildur's bones.
Vágari the Wanderer has appeared by the waggon. But why has he chosen to appear now?
Gandalf is by the waggon bearing Isildur's bones, near to the Gladden Fields.
